Issues: The aesthetic, while appealing to certain niche markets (grunge, gothic, vintage), relies heavily on a common motif (skull) and abstract lines. To increase commercial appeal, the pattern could be refined or integrated into a more specific, marketable style (e.g., specific tattoo art, vintage poster, specific textile patterns).
The current execution is a strong graphic design, but to maximize sales viability, professional resolution and high-resolution vector versions would be required for printing and digital use.
